CustomField.description: If this is a family development, select "None". Otherwise, "55+ Exclusive" means all hh members must be 55 or older; "Over 18" means one hh member must be 55 or older and the youngest hh member must be 19 or older; etc. This info is used for the listing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this is a family development, select "None". Otherwise, "55+ Exclusive" means all hh members must be 55 or older; "Over 18" means one hh member must be 55 or older and the youngest hh member must be 19 or older; etc. This info is used for the listing.
CustomField.label: Age Restriction
